metadata.title: 모니터링, 로깅, 자동 평가 시스템 및 최종 제출물

story.soThat: 평가 기준 보너스 점수를 획득하고 최종 제출물을 완성할 수 있다

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Loguru 설정: 모든 행동, LLM 호출, 센서 데이터를 JSON 형식으로 로깅
OpenLit 통합: LLM 비용, 지연 시간, 토큰 사용량 자동 추적
pytest 자동 평가 스크립트: 성공률, 평균 실행 시간 측정
벤치마크 리포트 생성: 비용/지연 분석, 성능 지표 자동 생성
평가 명세서 작성: 1페이지 분량, 평가 항목별 증거 제시
프레젠테이션 영상 스크립트: 5분 발표용 스크립트 작성
최종 코드 정리: README 업데이트, 문서화 완성
제출용 파일 생성: 이름_학번.zip 형식으로 패키징

doc.title: LLM_ROBOT_2 Architecture
doc.snippet: OpenLit (LLM 추적) + Loguru (행동 로깅) - Monitoring layer defined for LLM cost tracking, latency measurement, and structured JSON logging

doc.title: Epic Breakdown and Story Details
doc.snippet: Story 2.5 mapped to: LLM 제어 기술 (6번 - 로깅) and 보너스 (벤치마크, 자동평가). All 8 acceptance criteria defined for monitoring, evaluation, and final deliverables.

doc.title: Epic 2 - Story 2.5 Requirements
doc.section: Story 2.5: 모니터링, 로깅, 자동 평가 시스템 및 최종 제출물
doc.snippet: Prerequisites: All Stories 1.1-2.4 (entire project). Final story of Epic 2 focusing on Loguru setup, OpenLit integration, pytest automated evaluation, benchmark reporting, evaluation specification, presentation script, code cleanup, and submission packaging.

doc.title: Story 2.4 - Previous Story Reference
doc.snippet: Excellent logging pattern with 98+ logger statements. Production-ready quality with zero findings approval. 3-tier test structure (unit/integration/E2E) achieving 25/25 tests passing (100%).

doc.title: BMM Workflow Status
doc.snippet: Epic 2: 4/5 stories complete (80%). Story 2.5 is final story. Deadline: November 3rd. Focus: Complete monitoring, logging, evaluation systems and final submission deliverables.

artifact.reason: Primary LLM consumer requiring OpenLit monitoring. Add logging for plan_mission() and replan_mission() method calls, LLM prompts/responses, RAG queries.
Action execution agent requiring Loguru logging. Log all execute_action() calls, Webots API interactions, sensor data reads, safety validation results.
Verification agent with existing 98+ logger statements (Story 2.4 pattern). Extend JSON logging for verify_mission(), analyze_failure_reason(), delegation events.
Central mission coordinator. Add logging for mission lifecycle (start/end), agent transitions, retry loops, final mission status. Critical for benchmark metrics collection.
Existing test infrastructure (19/19 passing). Use as reference for pytest patterns when creating tests/evaluation/test_evaluation.py
Unit test example (11/11 passing). Reference for test structure and mock patterns in evaluation tests.
E2E test example (7/7 passing). Pattern for full mission cycle testing. Use similar structure for evaluation mission tests.

package.name: pytest-html
package.note: ADD - Required for evaluation HTML reports (AC #3)

framework.name: Pydantic
framework.purpose: Data validation and function calling schemas

constraints.constraint: MUST NOT modify existing agent logic or functionality - only add logging/monitoring instrumentation
All logging MUST use Loguru structured logging with JSON serialization capability
OpenLit integration MUST be non-invasive - automatic instrumentation of OpenAI API calls
pytest evaluation scripts MUST be standalone - executable with single command 'pytest tests/evaluation/'
Benchmark report generation MUST be automated - no manual data entry required
Evaluation specification MUST fit on 1 page - concise evidence with file:line citations
Submission ZIP file MUST exclude logs/, __pycache__/, .env, and temporary files
All new code MUST include docstrings and maintain existing code quality standards (92.5/100)
Testing MUST follow 3-tier structure: unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests (reference Story 2.4)
Final deliverables MUST align with evaluation criteria mapping defined in docs/epics.md

tests.standards: Testing framework: pytest with fixtures, mocks, and parametrized tests. Structure: 3-tier testing (unit, integration, E2E) as established in Story 2.4. Coverage target: 90%+ for critical evaluation/logging code, 100% for evaluation tests. Test organization: Separate tests/evaluation/ directory for Story 2.5 evaluation tests. Existing passing tests: 147 unit tests, 14 integration tests, 109 regression tests (total 270+). HTML reporting: Use pytest-html for evaluation_report.html generation. Mock patterns: Use unittest.mock for LLM calls, Webots API, file I/O. Test execution: Single command 'pytest tests/evaluation/' must run all evaluation tests. Benchmark validation: Automated checks for metric accuracy, report format, file structure. Reference quality: Story 2.4 achieved 25/25 tests passing (100%) with zero code review findings.

ideas.test: - test_logger_config_initialization: Verify Loguru setup with JSON format - test_log_file_creation: Check logs/ directory and file naming (mission_{timestamp}.json) - test_log_levels: Validate INFO/DEBUG/WARNING/ERROR level filtering - test_structured_logging: Verify JSON serialization of log messages - test_agent_logging_integration: Check Planner/Actor/Verifier log all key events

- test_openlit_initialization: Verify OpenLit init with correct config - test_llm_call_tracking: Mock OpenAI calls, verify metrics collected (cost/latency/tokens) - test_metric_aggregation: Check total calls, average response time calculations - test_dashboard_data: Validate data sent to OpenLit dashboard

- test_evaluation_missions_load: Load test_missions.json successfully - test_mission_execution: Run 5 predefined missions, measure success/failure - test_success_rate_calculation: Verify (success_count / total_missions) * 100 - test_execution_time_measurement: Check average execution time metric - test_replan_count_tracking: Verify replan events counted correctly - test_html_report_generation: Confirm pytest-html creates evaluation_report.html

- test_json_log_parsing: Parse logs/mission_*.json files - test_metric_aggregation: Aggregate performance/LLM/cost metrics - test_report_generation: Generate docs/evaluation/benchmark_report.md - test_report_sections: Verify all sections present (performance/LLM/tokens/cost) - test_markdown_formatting: Check tables, headings, formatting valid

- test_evaluation_spec_exists: Verify docs/evaluation/evaluation_spec.md created - test_evaluation_spec_length: Check page count <= 1 - test_presentation_script_exists: Verify docs/evaluation/presentation_script.md created - test_readme_updated: Check README.md has evaluation sections - test_submission_zip_creation: Run scripts/create_submission.py - test_zip_contents: Verify ZIP includes required files, excludes logs/__pycache__ - test_zip_size: Check ZIP file < 100MB
